title: Creative Design Portfolio
description: A collection of AI-generated artwork, brand designs, business cards, social media ads, presentations, and marketing creatives.
longDescription:
A curated showcase of creative design work spanning AI-generated artwork, brand identity design, business card layouts, Facebook ad creatives, corporate presentations, and marketing materials.

This collection highlights expertise in combining AI tools with traditional design workflows to produce professional-grade visuals for brands including GainWix, AptonWorks, and IVA Music Academy.
